name: ROYAL ASL Brothers
description:
~ Marriage ~

The kingdom of New World is where everyone wants to be, where something new is happening every day and the thrill of just being alive is coursing through the very streets. The princes of the land are just as loved as the wonderous kingdom too, and for three men who aren't even twenty-five, they can run the land with a tighter fist and agree better than most governments would like. With the oldest, Portgas D Ace, being strong enough mentally and physically to run the kingdom as the next king easily, the second oldest, Sabo, being smart enough to come up with any battle plan or treaty, and the youngest, Luffy, being charismatic enough to make even the toughest of enemies his friend.

WARNING: nothing really, but it's limitless for if y'all wanna get 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂.

EXTRA: requests are open! go to my profile for the rules of requesting, aka what i do and do not do.

Bye! Love you! -big sis Lynn
creator: Lilly Beans
